bridgeIpAddress.title: Bridge IP Address
bridgeIpAddress.description: The IP address of your Nuki Bridge.

bridgeApiToken.title: Bridge API Token
bridgeApiToken.description: The API token of your Nuki Bridge. Get it by pressing the button on the bridge and calling /auth on the Bridge API.

bridgeApiPort.title: Bridge API Port
bridgeApiPort.description: The port of the Nuki Bridge API.

hostNameOrIpAddress.title: Homebridge Host IP Address
hostNameOrIpAddress.description: The IP address of the machine running Homebridge. Used by the Nuki Bridge to send state callbacks.

hostCallbackApiPort.title: Homebridge Callback Port
hostCallbackApiPort.description: The port on which Homebridge listens for callbacks from the Nuki Bridge.

bridgeRebootSwitch.title: Bridge Reboot Switch
bridgeRebootSwitch.description: Adds a switch to HomeKit that reboots the Nuki Bridge.

isApiEnabled.title: Enable Local API
isApiEnabled.description: Enables a local HTTP API on Homebridge for external integrations.

apiPort.title: Local API Port
apiPort.description: Port for the local Homebridge API (only used when isApiEnabled is true).

apiToken.title: Local API Token
apiToken.description: Token for the local Homebridge API (only used when isApiEnabled is true).

nukiId.title: Nuki ID
nukiId.description: The Nuki ID of the device, as returned by the Bridge API /list endpoint.

defaultLockName.title: Lock Name
defaultLockName.description: The name of the lock service in HomeKit.

defaultLatchName.title: Latch Name
defaultLatchName.description: The name of the unlatch service in HomeKit.

unlatchLock.title: Show Unlatch as Separate Lock
unlatchLock.description: Adds a second lock service in HomeKit that triggers the unlatch (door opener) action.

nightLockSwitch.title: Night Lock Switch
nightLockSwitch.description: Adds a switch that triggers the full lock (2-turn night lock, action 6). Turning it off locks once (action 2).

isDoorSensorEnabled.title: Enable Door Sensor
isDoorSensorEnabled.description: Adds a contact sensor showing whether the door is open or closed (requires Nuki door sensor).

isSingleAccessoryModeEnabled.title: Single Accessory Mode
isSingleAccessoryModeEnabled.description: Combines all services (lock, latch, door sensor) into a single HomeKit accessory instead of separate ones.

isRingToOpenEnabled.title: Ring to Open (Opener only)
isRingToOpenEnabled.description: For Nuki Opener: adds a switch that enables Ring to Open mode.

isContinuousModeEnabled.title: Continuous Mode (Opener only)
isContinuousModeEnabled.description: For Nuki Opener: adds a switch that enables Continuous Mode (door stays open).

layout.title: Homebridge Host
layout.description: Required for receiving real-time lock state updates from the Bridge.
